content:
💡 react-doctor | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Automated code review and quality assurance for React applications, identifying potential bugs and bad practices before they become major issues.
✨ Key Features: • Deterministic code scanning for React issues • Covers state & effects, performance, architecture, security, and accessibility • Works with all React frameworks and libraries (Next.js, Vite, React Native, etc.)
📖 Summary: React Doctor is a tool that deterministically scans React codebases to identify issues related to state and effects, performance, architecture, security, and accessibility. It works across various React frameworks and libraries and can be integrated into development workflows via CLI, CI, or coding agents.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
